subject: Meeting Minutes - OAC Meeting #27 - March 13, 2026 - Waterfront Tower
body:
All,

Please find the minutes from OAC Meeting #27 for the Waterfront Mixed-Use Tower project held on March 13, 2026.

Attendees: Alex Thornton (TA), Priya Patel (TA), Sarah Chen (PSE), Mike Rodriguez (VW), Karen Walsh (SM)

Key Discussion Items:

1. STRUCTURAL STEEL - Levels 15-20 erection on schedule. Connection detail at J-7 (RFI-247) to be resolved this week. Sarah confirmed material for levels 20-25 is ordered and on track.

2. BUILDING ENVELOPE - Curtain wall mock-up testing scheduled for March 25. Mike to coordinate with testing lab. SUB-090 resubmission under review.

3. MECHANICAL - HVAC diffuser conflict with structural beams identified by Karen. New RFI to be issued. Submittal SUB-089 on hold pending resolution.

4. SCHEDULE - Overall project tracking 3 days ahead. Critical path items: curtain wall mock-up approval, roof steel CO #12 approval.

5. CHANGE ORDERS - CO #12 (roof steel) submitted by PSE for $148,000. Owner review in progress.

Action Items:
- Alex: Respond to RFI-247 by March 20
- Mike: Schedule mock-up test, confirm lab availability
- Karen: Issue formal RFI for diffuser/beam conflict
- Priya: Distribute revised structural drawings (S-401 through S-410)

Next meeting: March 27, 2026 at 10:00 AM

Priya Patel
Project Architect
Thornton Architects

subject: Mtg Minutes - Site Progress Meeting #8 - March 12 - City Hall Renovation
body:
Linda, David,

Minutes from Progress Meeting #8 for the City Hall Renovation Phase 2.

Date: March 12, 2026
Location: On-site trailer

1. DEMOLITION - Level 3 selective demolition 85% complete. Discovered additional asbestos in pipe insulation at west wing mechanical room. Abatement contractor mobilizing Monday.

2. SEISMIC RETROFIT - Level 1 and 2 anchor installation complete. Level 3 on hold pending RFI-113 resolution (anchor bolt spacing conflict with existing rebar).

3. HERITAGE WINDOWS - North facade window replacement samples approved by Heritage Committee. RFI-112 closed. Fabrication lead time: 12 weeks from order.

4. ELEVATOR - New elevator pit excavation started. Encountered unexpected soil conditions - change order forthcoming.

5. SCHEDULE - Currently 4 days behind due to asbestos discovery. Recovery plan being developed.

Action Items:
- James: Respond to RFI-113 by March 19
- Linda: Submit asbestos change order with pricing
- Linda: Provide elevator pit soil condition documentation

James Morrison, P.Eng.
Morrison Engineering Group
